title: 5 Months Procurement Assistant (up to $2,500)  #HMS
description:
Job Summary

Assist with procurement tender processes and stakeholder collaboration to support effective purchasing solutions and supplier management within the College.

Responsibilities

  • Coordinate and schedule project meetings during the tender stage to ensure timely progress and stakeholder alignment
  • Facilitate site show rounds and manage tender clarifications to support transparent and efficient tender processes
  • Collaborate seamlessly with internal and external stakeholders to ensure accurate information flow and tender closing
  • Generate management reports for approval to support informed decision-making during procurement activities
  • Build and maintain trust-based relationships with College stakeholders to understand business needs and develop purchasing solutions
  • Resolve supply, quality, service, and invoicing issues by liaising between suppliers and internal stakeholders to ensure smooth operations
  • Guide requestors to clearly define all requirements and scope of work before sourcing to optimize procurement outcomes
  • Prepare ad hoc tender and administrative documents such as drafting Invitations to Tender and preparing letters of award, ensuring compliance with College policies and declarations
  • Support additional duties of similar responsibility and complexity as assigned by the line manager or College to contribute to operational effectiveness

Working Hours and Location
5 months contract
Tampines
7.45am - 4.45pm (Mon - Fri)

Interested candidates, do submit your resume to: jocelynchan@recruitexpress.com.sg OR telegram @jocelynchan

Jocelyn Chan| Consultant | Recruit Express Pte Ltd (Healthcare & Lifescience)
Company EA Licence number : 99C4599
Personnel EA License: R1331820

postedCompany.description:
Established since 1996, Recruit Express has emerged as the leading staffing solutions provider that has set a proven track record for matching the right people to the right organization within the shortest time. With our vast network of resources, extensive databases and defined recruitment processes, we have been successfully bridging talented job seekers of the highest calibre to employers who only want the best in their teams.


In our relentless pursuit of excellent service, we have adopted best practices and dynamic growth strategies in expanding our operations across the Asia Pacific regions: We have offices in Singapore, Sydney, Hong Kong, Kuala Lumpur, Taipei, Shanghai, Beijing, Tokyo and Bangkok.

With 400 permanent committed consultants from various professional backgrounds and disciplines, we make a difference by delivering top-notch services to our clients and candidates alike.
